text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: No! I'll never, ever forgive you!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Hic! Sniffle... B-but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like those girls are having a fight. Just as
I'm about to go see if things are okay, two
familiar faces get there first.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Did you two have a fight? Everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, don't cry... Umm, here! You can use my
handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine... I have one... Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'd like to hear what happened here, but... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know! Would you two like to have some ice
cream with us?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: I want strawberry ice cream...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: And I want chocolate chip...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! I'll go get some for everyone right
now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Ines. Didn't you just say money's pretty
tight for you this month?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! Payday's still a ways off...
choice_data_list: I can pay for you all, if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?! I'll take you up on your offer, then!

text_block_list.name: Girls
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks for treating us too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you're both feeling better now. So,
what were you fighting about anyway?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: She told me she's moving away! Just like that!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to go either, but I had to come say
bye to you...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text:
So you're not gonna play with me anymore, huh?
Then go! Go and play with all your new friends
and forget all about me!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: I... I don't want that!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: I don't want that either! I... Sniff! Hic!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There, there. You two must really love each
other.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You know, I hang out with Ryan a lot.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I also spend time with my other classmates
and meet up with friends who live far away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Same! All my friends are important to me!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: ...All of them?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's right! So even if you're far apart, you'll still
be best friends as long as you want to be!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: Okay... Sniff... Sorry for getting mad at you. I wanna be friends with you forever.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Th-then let's do it! Let's be best friends for life!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: O-okay!
choice_data_list: It's great that you two made up!
Now you won't be lonely even if you're apart.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're very welcome! All's well that ends well,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After parting with the two little girls, we all start
walking back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey Ryan, what would you do if I went away
somewhere really far?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'd be sad, but... our bond's strong enough
to survive any distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, forget I said that! Haha! Wow, that was
embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on, let me hear what you said again!
What was that about our bond?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text:
But we won't be able to play whenever we want
anymore...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You can still call each other and meet up on
weekends! That way, you won't be lonely even if
you can't be together every day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And you'll have even more fun when you do get
to see each other because it'll be so special!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text: Ooh, okay! Yeah, it won't feel so lonely that way!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Red Hat
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Let's call each other lots and lots!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How about you shake hands, then? Not to say
goodbye, but to promise that you'll see each
other again!
